text.autoconfig.autologin.title: AutoLogin Config
text.autoconfig.autologin.option.default: Password used when no server-specific password is set
text.autoconfig.autologin.option.trigger: Regex pattern to detect login request messages
text.autoconfig.autologin.option.success: Regex pattern to detect successful login
text.autoconfig.autologin.option.loginCo: Command to send, use %s as placeholder for password (e.g., login %s or l %s)
text.autoconfig.autologin.option.serverP:
Set password for specific server
Use /autologin set <password> in server
